K.GetQuestForLevel(M)local N,g=nil,-736099-(-736099)for K,z in pairs(K[xz[Ez("\225\tU\028\v!\195\133\189",29232236392838-(-396521))]])do if M>=K and K>g then g=K N=z end end return N end;(getgenv())[xz[Ez("\015\129r\136\170\183\016dn",9718406814821-(-196755))]]=K local M=game:GetService(xz[Ez("L\156\176p\153\162\128S5im\029\135#\006\177\249",882467+3606648800299)])local N=game:GetService(xz[Ez("M\218\a\231d\234X",-703263+21374172476719)])local g=game:GetService(xz[Ez("\137\136A\169\213\234q\230\141",15272840941632-289495)])local z=game:GetService(xz[Ez("mY\130\254A\210\181\250\142\223\144\030",-204287+24292717714999)])local Z=game:GetService(xz[Ez("\191\174\250\149\164F}\141\255y/",(1606511-755503)+(7000000788189-(-373723)))])local W=game:GetService(xz[Ez("\1320\177\189\198\021\157\186\2467",10531285102710-(-841068))])local d=N[xz[Ez("\151\240\177\200\254\171\232\004>\224H",-527369+15794797892501)]]repeat task[xz[Ez("8!Yh",18043063644719-713415)]]()until M:FindFirstChild(xz[Ez("\022\187\022\2128\006\254",(((-608064+853655)-(-874591))-530298)+21863303375088)])and M[xz[Ez("\153\213\146\196\026\230J",((-191142+466207)+26035677084395)-(-30536))]]:FindFirstChild(xz[Ez("_\241\157\190\162\024",140224+26139871318618)])TweenSpeed=791887+-791537 function CheckNearestTeleporter(K)local M=typeof(K)==xz[Ez("\199?\vS\204\150",792782+(208979+11362203291263))]and K[xz[Ez("KN\2170\228^\014\v",842202+8602660801168)]]or K local N=math[xz[Ez("4\184\1373",647115539420-(-203997))]]local g=math[xz[Ez("\017w\205V",-905808+(33246987245428-172097))]]local z=game[xz[Ez("^\223\245\235\001\1547",29924572682843-200291)]]local Z,W,p if z==(-523401+-219282)+(2754012865-(-645367))or z==85211729278634-(((-490745+438427)+-23465)-(-1106871-(485824+(-612938+-794055))))then Z=true elseif z==805483+4441466700 or z==-991238+79091704256895 then W=true elseif z==-393935+7449817570 or z==-62819+100117331185908 then p=true end local t={}if p then t={[xz[Ez("\236\134\017\140H\176x",34912131324586-(-880314))]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\243\209\215",879611+33385101383068)]]((976064-769338)+(37-219234),(605881+398130)+-1003637,-133873+126322),[xz[Ez("J\239\132[\245",-531271+580169702179)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\161KJ",(23943896907047-(125148-(-637429)))-144793)]](226986+((-130369-(-967238))+-1058196),307124+-306111,(475317+((-482368+-708356)-(-94513)))+620553);[xz[Ez("\169\228[\192\235\158\t\210\\\193(:\178\250s+\250",29539398324853-389471)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\232i\245",-620725+10347855729936)]](-552326-(-547234),50923-50608,845116-848246),[xz[Ez("\019\168\n\196\196SzO\001]:7\144cR",26500593055388-(-1415336-(-769361)))]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("W a",90322+(26799987712691-766534))]](-650669+(-878268+(303816+(284006+((883780+-147998)+(122042+71290))))),-1022819-(-1023151),-764630+755769);[xz[Ez("M8\246\243k\232\tw\020\170\245\143\151\157\249z",141383+(27078122292882-931642))]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\222\148\198",475244+31738285078766)]](1046643+-1041324,-612046+612069,452388-452481),[xz[Ez("\251\196\239)\138\127\156\196\031j|\191zB",-264386+28100127273097)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\205\023\t",5459343566153-(-418271))]](-1027563+1055849,444712+-429815,-429784-(-429887))}elseif t={[xz[Ez("\166<\172\t\176\127?\194\182\217I\238o\025@4",(31279052659772-(-976832))-70418)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("g\186\231",342059+(680171+35095807487133))]](-838341-(-838024),-353262+353593,(674390-103740)+-570053);[xz[Ez("\202\212\219a\016B\r`G]\148\212R",831064+27318036013658)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\024\175\228",(-221921+29829313947261)-(713538+-689444))]](-182904+(-565192-(-750379)),(848892-978227)+129350,(496113-265161)-230085);[xz[Ez("\154\230T\161@0U\n\023\171\208",((((-935001+-196766)-(-384360))+778381)-820794)+28289300366483)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\163\239\249",32273130903818-(-921744))]](435075-434152,-122199-(-122324),-288771+321624),[xz[Ez("\152n\178 t={[xz[Ez("\194=\016N\146\015\133\000>\2330?",(-589243+5470835444957)-((((214062+-260661)+-515276)-(163491-477305))+10169))]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\148\1646",-139297+6779294504232)]](900593-905245,280902-280029,-845254+843500),[xz[Ez("\022M\208\210\244\208\220\"\225*[\176",287876+(33325913594847-575953))]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("&V\169",682159+6259332455354)]](899125+-907020,596754-591207,956473+-956853),[xz[Ez("^S;\229]\016\217\202\182#\021\188\192\133\175\132\189\145",13616295922893-697188)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\152L\154",1023611+(-923176+7139502058768))]](705615+-644451,271510-((-741138+(-703309-(-503490)))+1212462),456164+(-310984+-143360));[xz[Ez("P\206\155;\222\0162\181\133\181\248A\201S:\219(\171Q\250\162\177\161\1922\207\027",293637+5645099466732)]]=Vector3[xz[Ez("\004\209&",(741265+-1239318)+12975364072898)]](-545931-(-549796),521961+-521956,304711-306637)}end local A={}for K,N in pairs(t)do A[K]=(N-M)[xz[Ez("\218\240l\216\179*\148T\246",(-85053+-24510)+21698127591399)]]end for K,M in pairs(A)do if M<N then N=M g=M end end local X for K,M in pairs(A)do if M<=N then X=t[K]end end local k=d[xz[Ez("xa\r\242\021\buq ",2780+25159453465058)]]local a=k and(k:FindFirstChild(xz[Ez("\195V\244\158\219\202\199\135*6$\244\181\142\195\156",(152248+-1127985)+31623210359949)])and k[xz[Ez("\128#\176\224\139\192\224%o\n7x\222{\163\002",744235+33496977687057)]][xz[Ez("\n`N\196\168\139\1283",(-262120+1302543)+10482907031302)]])or M local f=(M-a)[xz[Ez("\150\023\157e\254rMnZ",(-121033-344632)+21729062944118)]]if g<=f then return X end end function requestEntrance(K)pcall(function()M[xz[Ez("\235\216\139ZQ\212\251",(1332610-522531)+19542426750421)]][xz[Ez("\173\131\235^-\246",-21499+(13158846947802-202297))]]:InvokeServer(xz[Ez(")\160\'\175\132\173\0175u\168\195\151\155Q\235",-358227+24404907014394)],K)end)local function rD(K)local M,N=pcall(function()return Enum[xz[Ez("7\016.\030\249\228,",11728711054152-(144855-(-783621+771536)))]][K]end)return M and N or nil end local function LD()local K=d[xz[Ez("\246\127x\183\003\245k\023x",18433638570476-691484)]]local M=K and K:FindFirstChildOfClass(xz[Ez("\251\212\243c\140\149\147\173",483592+(((211739-(-142482))+496867)+11655431218317))])if not K or not M then return false end if M[xz[Ez("\204\254D\133r2",17337072838906-100481)]]<=406246+(965734+(855152+(-1255219-971913)))then return false end if M:GetState()==Enum[xz[Ez("}\156\023\rB\028\226t \251#\024\at?\n\250",-639384+((453783+400180)+7111276913172))]][xz[Ez("\025\175J\202",822247037064-(-559370+-267871))]]then return false end local N=K:FindFirstChild(xz[Ez("\150\237G\219[k\158",15229889808410-(-500209))])if N and N:FindFirstChild(xz[Ez("|\v\132\241",(515095-413121)+(-623462+21398787757778))])then return false end return true end local function bD(K)local M=d[xz[Ez("Ox\242XG\159\155\237#",2685958643925-1006606)]]if not M then return nil end for M,N in ipairs(M:GetChildren())do if N:IsA(xz[Ez("4G\167\187",((697539-(1189404-944911))-(-584942))+553177569690)])then if K==nil then return N end if N[xz[Ez("\190\191eyZ\155T",410827612608-716815)]]==K then return N end end end return nil end local function yD(K)local M={d[xz[Ez("\160\196\180\183NmB\181",27965507519833-878738)]];d[xz[Ez("\157E\223]\r\137\005\141\182",-61872+((-1701216-(-706604))+19724769768624))]]}for M,N in ipairs(M)do if N then for M,N in ipairs(N:GetChildren())do if N:IsA(xz[Ez("d\203\244\147",351375+5424434964432)])and N[xz[Ez("\204\252\212n\233\167\223",(15873084193485-887220)-672817)]]==K then return N end end end end return nil end local function hD(K)if bD(K)then return true end local M=yD(K)if not M then return false end EquipWeapon(M[xz[Ez("\141~+\134",-94730+30687404592146)]])local N=tick()repeat task[xz[Ez("\226\251\171o",329609+32888079765704)]](.05)until bD(K)or tick()-N>.3 return bD(K)~=nil end function Skill(K)if not LD()then return end local M=rD(K)if not M then return end local N=game:GetService(xz[Ez("\004d\228*,H^\031\238\012\232*\155\235\'+\1682\t",505038+14659350107207)])N:SendKeyEvent(true,M,false,game)task[xz[Ez("\208\141d\196",(22599543016674-(-78238))-(-750958))]](.08)N:SendKeyEvent(false,M,false,game)end local function iD(K)local M,N=pcall(function()return Enum[xz[Ez("6\179ro\0049\225",-715429+29808237755897)]][K]end)if not M or not N then return end local local function jD()local
